# callout

**Interface Property**

A delegate that enables you to customize the annotation’s callout.

## Declaration

```swift
callout?: AnnotationCalloutDelegate | null;
```

## Discussion

The default value is `null`. See [doc://com.apple.mapkitjs/documentation/MapKitJS/AnnotationCalloutDelegate] for details.

## Creating callouts

- **calloutEnabled**: A Boolean value that determines whether the map shows a callout.
- **calloutOffset**: The offset, in CSS pixels, of a callout from the top center of the element.
